_meta.game_patch: Season 8 dönemi (Veteran Instinct, Weapon Guard, Last Bastion, Pommel Strike dahil)
_meta._verify: Perk/skill etkileri wiki'den birebir alındı; oyun içi değerlerle kullanıcı tarafından doğrulanmalı.

name: Fighter
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + her 5 seviyede 1 ek slot; level 15'te 4 slot

perks.name: Adrenaline Spike
perks.effect: HP %40'in altindayken: +%15 Action Speed, +%3 Move Speed, +%30 Interaction Speed, 12 sn (24 sn cooldown)

perks.name: Barricade
perks.effect: Defensive stance'te +75 Armor Rating ve +75 Magical Resistance

perks.name: Combo Attack
perks.effect: 2 sn icinde ardisik melee vuruslar stack basina +%10 Physical Power (maks 2 stack)

perks.name: Counterattack
perks.effect: Basarili blok sonrasi 3 sn boyunca +%10 Move Speed ve Action Speed

perks.name: Defense Mastery
perks.effect: +%15 ek armor rating bonusu; Physical Damage Reduction tavanini %75'e cikarir

perks.name: Dual Wield
perks.effect: Iki el de doluyken +%10 Action Speed (fener ve kalkan haric)

perks.name: Last Bastion
perks.effect: HP %33'te: +150 Armor, +50 Magical Resistance, +%30 Projectile Reduction, 8 sn (48 sn cooldown)

perks.name: Projectile Resistance
perks.effect: +%10 Projectile Damage Reduction; defensive stance'te ek +%10

perks.name: Shield Mastery
perks.effect: Defensive stance'te +%10 Move Speed; basarili blok 1 sn boyunca +%50 Action Speed ve +%10 Physical Power verir

perks.name: Slayer
perks.effect: Cift el silahlarda +5 Physical Buff Weapon Damage ve +10 Move Speed; plate zirh kullanimi kaybedilir

perks.name: Sword Mastery
perks.effect: Kilic tipi silahlarda +2 Physical Buff Damage ve +%5 Action Speed; defensive stance'te +10 Move Speed

perks.name: Veteran Instinct
perks.effect: Savasa girince 4 sn +%10 Physical Damage Reduction ve Physical Power (10 sn savas-disi gerektirir)

perks.name: Weapon Guard
perks.effect: Silahla bloklarken +%5 Physical Damage Reduction; basarili blok 2 sn +%10 Physical Power ve +%5 Action Speed verir

skills.name: Adrenaline Rush
skills.effect: 8 sn +%15 Action Speed ve +%5 Move Speed; sonrasinda 2 sn -%8 Action Speed ve -%4 Move Speed cezasi (28 sn cooldown)

skills.name: Breakthrough
skills.effect: Yavaslatma debufflarini ve knockback'i kaldirir/bagisiklik verir; 8 sn +7 Move Speed Add (24 sn cooldown)

skills.name: Disarm
skills.effect: 8 sn icinde melee saldiri bloklanirsa hedefi 1 sn silahsizlandirir (24 sn cooldown, silah gerekir)

skills.name: Fortified Ground
skills.effect: Sancak yerlestirir (suresiz); 33m icindeki muttefiklere +3 All Attributes (18 sn cooldown)

skills.name: Pommel Strike
skills.effect: Tek elli ana silahin kabzasiyla vurus: 15 Physical Base Damage (%100 scaling), hedefi susturur; kesinti halinde +10 hasar ve 2 sn -%50 Move Speed (18 sn cooldown)

skills.name: Second Wind
skills.effect: 12 sn boyunca maks HP'nin %40'ini yeniler; Adrenaline Rush cezalarini kaldirir; tek kullanim, Tier 5 hizinda sarj olur

skills.name: Shield Slam
skills.effect: Kalkan darbesi: 30 Physical Base Damage (%100 scaling), 3 sn -%20 Move Speed, knockback (8 sn cooldown)

skills.name: Spell Reflection
skills.effect: Bloklarken projectile/hitscan buyuleri yansitir; 5 sn veya yansimaya kadar +%15 Magical Damage Reduction (18 sn cooldown)

skills.name: Sprint
skills.effect: 3 Momentum stack (her biri +10 Move Speed Add); 2 sn'de 1 stack duser (28 sn cooldown)

skills.name: Taunt
skills.effect: 7.5m alan: canavar aggro'su +%200; 8 sn +%12 Physical ve Magical Damage Reduction (18 sn cooldown)

skills.name: Victory Strike
skills.effect: 10 sn icindeki ilk saldiri +%40 Physical Power; oyuncu oldururse cooldown'suz yenilenir (24 sn cooldown)

_todo: Zirh listeleri (14 kask, 20 govde, 13 bacak, 8 el, 16 ayak, 7 pelerin) item veritabanindan (darkerdb API) cekilecek - elle listelemeye gerek yok.
